final:
module RefModule(
   input                clk,
   input                reset,
   input                d,
 
   output reg           q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) q <= 1'b0;
        else q <= d;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
